title: Scholar Tech Desk
description: A reference-dependent wide-frame series where the same historical scholar and study remain consistent while different modern devices create time-space contrast.
creative_direction: Continuity through anachronism: image 01 establishes the scholar, robes, desk, room geometry, and natural light; images 02-04 depend on it while changing only the modern technology interaction.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Scholar Tech Desk
en.description: A reference-dependent wide-frame series where the same historical scholar and study remain consistent while different modern devices create time-space contrast.

zh-CN.title: 书斋科技错位
zh-CN.description: 同一历史书生和书斋保持一致,不同现代科技道具制造时空反差的宽幅系列。
